message:
fix(beads): redirect to mayor/rig/.beads when rig root has no database

SetupRedirect was creating redirects to rig-root .beads/ which has metadata
but no dolt database (the DB lives at mayor/rig/.beads/dolt/). This caused
bd to fail with 'dolt database not found' for all crew, polecat, and refinery
worktrees.

Now checks for actual database presence (dolt/ or beads.db) before choosing
the redirect target, falling back to mayor/rig/.beads when rig root has no DB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
